oneLiner: Observability for engineers who ship fast and hate surprises.
favoritePosts: $2.1M burned on tools nobody opened. We audited 14 SaaS logins last month and killed 9.
4 minutes. That's how long it took on-call to find the bad deploy Saturday. Six months ago the same incident took 90.
12 alerts per engineer per week is the break-even line. Above that and MTTR climbs linearly.
Every dashboard should earn its seat.
audience: Staff+ backend engineers and SREs at Series A-C startups
